Vilgain Grass-Fed Beef ColostrumColostrum is the first milk of the cow after the calf is born. It is exceptionally rich in immunity-boosting substances, especially immunoglobulin lgG. Vilgain offers you this unique source of bioactive substances in the form of freeze-dried powder from the Netherlands. The first milk is obtained only by collecting the surplus milk during the first hours after calving, which is not used by the calf. A csaptelepben perlátor is van, amellyel egyenletes lesz a vízáram, és nem fogsz mindent összefröcskölni.
